name: Overnight Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the cinnamon, brown sugar, and dry pudding evenly on top of the frozen dough pieces.
2. Cut the margarine into slices and place them on top of the mixture.
3. Let sit overnight at room temperature.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Place the cake in the preheated oven for 30 minutes.
6. After 15 minutes, cover the top with foil.
7. Carefully turn the cake upside down onto a plate using tongs or a spatula.
8. Each piece of dough will pull out separately.
Note: A small package of pudding mix is required (not instant).
